footer.about: A professional scientific platform connecting individuals with companies in the scientific, environmental, industrial, and health fields, offering integrated professional services.

hero.title: Connecting Knowledge with Opportunity
hero.subtitle: A comprehensive professional scientific platform connecting individuals with companies in the scientific, environmental, industrial, and health fields, offering integrated professional services for individuals and companies.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: RAN For Science is a specialized professional scientific platform dedicated to supporting individuals and companies through integrated solutions in recruitment, consulting, and regulatory services.
about.paragraph2: The platform seeks to build effective bridges between qualified talent and employers in the scientific, environmental, industrial, and health sectors, contributing to higher-quality hiring and a more efficient labor market.
about.paragraph3: The platform also provides professional support services for companies covering regulatory, commercial, and environmental aspects, empowering them to grow their business and comply with modern professional standards.
about.mission: At RAN For Science, we believe that connecting knowledge with opportunity is the foundation for building a stronger, more sustainable professional future.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: We offer a mix of free and paid services to support individuals and companies in the scientific, environmental, industrial, and health fields.
services.freeSubtitle: Supporting individuals and job seekers through essential free services that help them access suitable opportunities and improve their chances of employment.

jobPosting.title: Job Ad Posting
jobPosting.description: Publishing job ads and attracting suitable candidates for them.

cvScreening.title: CV Intake & Screening
cvScreening.description: Receiving and screening CVs according to job requirements, and shortlisting candidates for interviews.

consultation.title: General Scientific Consultations
consultation.description: Providing general scientific consultations to support job seekers and those interested in scientific fields.

services.paidSubtitle: Integrated professional services for companies and individuals, with the option to request a custom quote for each service.

trust.freeConsultation: Free initial consultation, no commitment required

items.envReports: Preparing and updating environmental reports and records
items.envRehabilitation: Environmental rehabilitation and corrective action plans
